title: Foam Weather Strip, Multi Use, Twin Pack
features: SAVE ENERGY & MONEY: 151 Foam Weatherstrip, self adhesive draught excluder for hinged windows and doors, reduce draughts around the home.
QUICK & EASY TO INSTALL: 151 Foam Weatherstrip, open the hinged window or door, apply the adhesive side, cut to required length. Simple, quick DIY solution.
WEATHERPROOF SOLUTION: 151 Foam Weatherstrip, apply to windows and doors around the home, workshop or garage. Suitable to apply to mobile home or boat windows.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use foam weatherstrip. Tiwn pack 2 x 10M Rolls. Store at room temperature
description: 151 Adhesives Double Sided Tape, high tack for long term bonding for home, craft, DIY and securing display signage. Perfect to secure point of sale signs, use for crafting, securing card, fabrics & other decorative trims. Always ensure that the surface is clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying. Ready to use double sided tape. Size: 10m x 48mm x 0.15mm. Store at room temperature.
